name: alterlab-scgpt
description: Apply the scGPT single-cell foundation model (Cui 2024) to annotate and embed cells — zero-shot and fine-tuned cell-type annotation, gene/cell embeddings, batch integration, and gene-regulatory / perturbation inference from AnnData. Use when annotating cell types with a pretrained foundation model, generating scGPT embeddings, integrating batches with a transformer, or running zero-shot single-cell inference on an h5ad. For probabilistic latent models (scVI/scANVI) prefer alterlab-scvi-tools; fo
author: AlterLab-IEU
